jobline.lineDescription: Size: 36mm x 80mm||Material: PE AP901||Print Colour: 6 Colour||Tool: D0892(3,7)(3,2)0.6mm Complex||Provided on 76mm Cores||Finishing: MATTE VARNISH||MACHINE APPLIED||Supply: Rolls of 5,000||Qty: 70.000||||||5,000 x CBG Baby Pink PANTONE 217 C||5,000 x CBG Candy PANTONE 218 C / TEXT PANTONE 217 C||5,000 x CBG Denim PANTONE 2137 C||5,000 x CBG Emerald PANTONE 2244 C||5,000 x CBG Latte PANTONE 482 C||5,000 x CBG Lime PANTONE 3507 C||5,000 x CBG Olive PANTONE 4214 C||5,000 x CBG Peach PANTONE 489 C||5,000 x CBG Sky Blue PANTONE 305 C||10,000 x BKD Baby Pink PANTONE 217 C||5,000 x BKD Sage PANTONE 2404 C||5,000 x CMA Sage PANTONE 2404 C||5,000 x CMO Sage PANTONE 2404 C||||||Group discount applied||3mm gap||
jobline.deliveryToAddress: Temper Group ||47 Hargraves Avenue ||Albion Park Rail NSW 2527
